content:
built a small free youtube thumbnail maker for my site previewmyprofile.com
it’s all browser based. you pick a template, edit the text, replace the image slots, adjust crop/zoom/position, and download a 16:9 jpg.
i’m keeping it intentionally simpler than canva because the goal is speed, not a full design suite.
would love feedback on the editor ux. especially around the image controls and whether the template editing feels obvious enough.
https://www.previewmyprofile.com/free-tools/youtube-thumbnail-maker

  submitted by   /u/fer_momento
[link]   [comments]
